full_text:
Peng Cai еҪӯжқҗ
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Peng Cai (еҪӯжқҗ)was born in Yuzhang. Bandit leader in the east of Poyang, destroyed by He Qi. Peng Cai lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
